'''Talvon Esan''' was a male [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who lived in the time of the [[Mandalorian Wars]] and the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==Biography==
Esan attended a gathering called by [[Darth Malak|Malak]], around the time [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] decided to involve the Order in the Mandalorian Wars (circa [[3963 BBY]]), in the presence of [[Meetra Surik]] and [[Bastila Shan]], and fellow comrades [[Cariaga Sin]], [[Xaset Terep]], and [[Nisotsa]]. In the end, Talvon made the fateful decision to defy the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]], and to go to war with Malak and Revan against the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]].

In Meetra's vision, he wielded a green [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

==Behind the scenes==
Talvon Esan's face is one of the available male faces for the Jedi Exile, to be chosen by the player at the start of the game. If the player, as a male, chooses his face, then Esan's face would be replaced with another.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}} {{Vision|[[Meetra Surik]]}}
